changes.value:
## What
Create a new workspace crate `swissarmyhammer-search/` with Cargo.toml, module structure, and types. Add to workspace members in root `Cargo.toml`.

Files to create:
- `swissarmyhammer-search/Cargo.toml` — deps: fuzzy-matcher, simsimd, model-embedding, serde, serde_json, async-trait, tokio, tracing, thiserror
- `swissarmyhammer-search/src/lib.rs` — public API re-exports
- `swissarmyhammer-search/src/document.rs` — `Document` struct (id, fields HashMap, body), `from_markdown_frontmatter(id, content)` parser
- `swissarmyhammer-search/src/result.rs` — `SearchResult` (id, score, strategy, matched_field), `SearchStrategy` enum
- `swissarmyhammer-search/src/error.rs` — `SearchError` type

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Crate compiles: `cargo check -p swissarmyhammer-search`
- [ ] `Document::from_markdown_frontmatter()` parses `---\\nkey: val\\n---\\nbody` into fields + body
- [ ] `SearchResult` and `SearchStrategy` types are public

## Tests
- [ ] `test_parse_frontmatter` — parses standard frontmatter+body into Document
- [ ] `test_parse_frontmatter_no_body` — handles empty body
- [ ] `test_parse_plain_yaml` — handles yaml-only (no body field)
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-search`

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,20 +1,18 @@
 ## What
-Create a new workspace crate `swissarmyhammer-search/` with Cargo.toml, module structure, and types. Add to workspace members in root `Cargo.toml`.
+Create a new workspace crate `swissarmyhammer-entity-search/` that provides in-memory search over `Entity` objects from `swissarmyhammer-entity`. Add to workspace members in root `Cargo.toml`.
+
+The crate operates on `Entity` directly — it uses `entity.fields` (HashMap<String, Value>) and entity.get_str() to access searchable text. No raw markdown parsing needed; the entity layer handles that.

 Files to create:
-- `swissarmyhammer-search/Cargo.toml` — deps: fuzzy-matcher, simsimd, model-embedding, serde, serde_json, async-trait, tokio, tracing, thiserror
-- `swissarmyhammer-search/src/lib.rs` — public API re-exports
-- `swissarmyhammer-search/src/document.rs` — `Document` struct (id, fields HashMap, body), `from_markdown_frontmatter(id, content)` parser
-- `swissarmyhammer-search/src/result.rs` — `SearchResult` (id, score, strategy, matched_field), `SearchStrategy` enum
-- `swissarmyhammer-search/src/error.rs` — `SearchError` type
+- `swissarmyhammer-entity-search/Cargo.toml` — deps: swissarmyhammer-entity, model-embedding, fuzzy-matcher, serde, serde_json, async-trait, tokio, tracing, thiserror
+- `swissarmyhammer-entity-search/src/lib.rs` — public API re-exports
+- `swissarmyhammer-entity-search/src/result.rs` — `SearchResult` (entity_id, score, strategy, matched_field), `SearchStrategy` enum (Fuzzy | Semantic)
+- `swissarmyhammer-entity-search/src/error.rs` — `SearchError` type

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] Crate compiles: `cargo check -p swissarmyhammer-search`
-- [ ] `Document::from_markdown_frontmatter()` parses `---\\nkey: val\\n---\\nbody` into fields + body
+- [ ] Crate compiles: `cargo check -p swissarmyhammer-entity-search`
 - [ ] `SearchResult` and `SearchStrategy` types are public
+- [ ] Depends on `swissarmyhammer-entity` for the `Entity` type

 ## Tests
-- [ ] `test_parse_frontmatter` — parses standard frontmatter+body into Document
-- [ ] `test_parse_frontmatter_no_body` — handles empty body
-- [ ] `test_parse_plain_yaml` — handles yaml-only (no body field)
-- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-search`
\ No newline at end of file
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-entity-search`
\ No newline at end of file
